items.name: King Kalbi Steak

items.name: SEOUL STYLE Bulgogi
items.description: A brothy variation of the classic Korean marinated beef dish, simmered with vegetables and glass noodles in a sweet, savory soy-based sauce in our special pot.
items.simplified_description: Korean beef dish with vegetables and noodles in broth.

items.description: Diced chicken stir-fried with vegetables in our homemade spicy sauce. Enough to serve 2 people.
